properties.Test Case: Ensure collections containing many complex books can be opened without undue delay (try the "very large collection" in bloom team/testng/materials for testing Bloom Editor)

properties.Test Case: Move, Add, Delete, & Duplicate pages on Eric Ding dictionary. Using Perf Meas, make sure that the speed is same or lower than previous versions. Notice thumbnail redraw speed. See card for details.

properties.Test Case: Install "SBC E1&E2 English books RISE 1.1 (July 2019).bloompack" from Shared drives \Bloom Team\Testing\Materials for Bloom Editor Testing. Try moving from book to book, sometimes editing, sometimes just clicking. Make sure Bloom is responsive.
